title: Non-record: Redoing ZerO initialization + Follow-up to PR 2104
author: AlstonTang

data.description: Deterministic-ish Hadamard/Identity-like initialization inspired by the ZerO initialization paper.
Progressively increases KV head count with depth so later layers can model more information.
Progressively increases rope proportion with depth.
Progressively increases MLP expansion factor with depth.

novel_contributions: Redoing ZerO initialization for more deterministic training behavior
Layer-wise progression of KV head count, RoPE proportion, and MLP expansion factor
Exploration of unconventional training ideas such as rolling data within batches and dynamic loss scaling
